findings.finding: clarify-critic.md line 107 contains `consult any requirements context loaded in clarify ¬ß2` ‚Äî a by-name reference using `clarify` as a proper noun. Anchor preservation does not save this; R14's git-diff invariant locks the dangling reference in unless explicitly carved out.
findings.evidence_quote: consult any requirements context loaded in clarify ¬ß2

findings.finding: Inserting ¬ß4a/¬ß4b/¬ß4c between ¬ß4 (Question Threshold) and ¬ß5 (Produce Clarify Output) violates the locality assumption in clarify-critic.md's ¬ß4 prose. An agent following the ¬ß4 pointer reads ~50‚Äì150 lines of research procedure before reaching ¬ß5's output framing.
findings.evidence_quote: folded into the ¬ß4 question list and presented alongside any remaining low-confidence dimensions as a single consolidated Q&A round

findings.finding: Lifecycle SKILL.md prose at lines 227, 237, 244, 248 left stale by R8's JSON-only template drop. R8's grep-based acceptance only catches the JSON literal, not the surrounding prose naming Clarify/Research phase boundaries.
findings.evidence_quote: After the full Clarify phase completes (including ¬ß3a critic review and any Q&A) ‚Äî before Research begins ‚Äî log lifecycle_start

findings.finding: Surviving research‚Üíspecify event's trigger-point becomes ambiguous in lifecycle SKILL.md prose. Post-merge an LLM could fire lifecycle_start at one Investigate sub-boundary and research‚Üíspecify at another, contradicting the spec's intent.
findings.evidence_quote: lifecycle_start is followed directly by research‚Üíspecify (no inner clarify‚Üíresearch)

findings.finding: R12 grep-target sources are not pre-flighted. If a parallel branch under #85 audit-and-grandfather restores a MUST to clarify.md before this merge lands, the implementer must silently strip it (violating CLAUDE.md grandfather provision) or fail R12.
